ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
((ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "UK") || ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "US")) &&
NOT( Subsidiary_Address_Override__c ) && ( (Country ='United States' && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, 'US'))) || (Country ='United Kingdom' && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, 'UK'))) ) && Event_Lead_Uploaded__c = TRUE) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please amend the 'Eficode Subsidiary' field to match the customer location. If strictly necessary speak to an admin who can apply 'Subsidiary Address Override'
